steps.title: Locate the defining description
steps.content: The passage identifies these entries as “hoaxes perpetrated as jokes by mischievous users”—they are deceptive tricks created for amusement.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the word
steps.content: ”Pranks” is a trick or joke meant to fool someone, perfectly matching entries created as jokes by mischievous users. The others name improvements (enhancements), discoveries (revelations), or studies (analyses), none fitting fake hoax entries. That matches choice B — B is correct.
